system.label: System
system.description: General Sentinel platform activity that does not fit a narrower category.

operator.label: Operator
operator.description: Controlled local operator actions triggered from the Sentinel Control Centre.

cadence.label: Cadence
cadence.description: Scheduled or manual Sentinel cadence activity, including report and notification preparation flows.

notification.label: Notification
notification.description: Notification payload preparation. This does not mean a message was sent.

deploy.label: Deploy
deploy.description: Readiness and deployment-preparation activity. This does not imply deployment occurred.

backup.label: Backup
backup.description: Backup verification, dry-run or restore simulation activity.

tenant.label: Tenant
tenant.description: Tenant registry, validation and configuration activity.

health.label: Health
health.description: SEO monitor, platform health and diagnostic status activity.

api.label: API
api.description: Local Sentinel API checks and read-only state API activity.

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Activity completed with a condition worth reviewing.

error.label: Error
error.description: Activity failed or indicates a blocking issue.
